title: 'Shocking' ruling strips Senegal of AFCON title, declares Morocco winner
description: Morocco was stunningly awarded the Africa Cup of Nations title on Tuesday by appeals judges who overturned Senegal’s victory in a chaotic final in January. The Confederation of African Football said its appeals board ruled that Senegal is “declared to have forfeited the final” and its 1-0 win in extra time becomes a 3-0 default win for host nation Morocco. FRANCE 24's James Vasina and sports journalist Karim Baldé discuss the ruling.

title: Senegal will appeal decision that gives AFCON title to Morocco

Fleeing the bombardment, residents from the predominantly Shiite area have sought refuge in the nearby Christian village of Deir al-Ahmar. FRANCE 24’s Laura Mousset travelled to this hilltop town overlooking the Bekaa Valley, around 100 kilometres northeast of Beirut, to witness this surge in solidarity.

It would also suggest Iran's senior leadership has been infiltrated by Israeli intelligence, says France 24's Angela Diffley, meaning Iran's leaders "can no longer trust anybody".

description: Sam Kerr nets the winner as Australia beat China 2-1 to reach the final of the 2026 Womens AFC Asian Cup.

title: Are the US and Israel waging war on Iran’s cultural heritage?
description: Iran says at least 56 of its heritage sites damaged or destroyed in war.

title: German Chancellor says Iran war has no military solution
description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the Iran conflict cannot be resolved militarily and must be resolved politically.

title: Mapping Israeli attacks and the displacement of one million in Lebanon
description: Nearly one in five people in Lebanon have been forced from their homes as Israel launches new ground operations.

title: Surge in US gas prices deepens political peril for Trump over Iran
description: The odds of a quick resolution to the war appear to be dwindling by the day, and the political stakes for the president are only growing.

title: US envoys meet Hamas in Cairo to salvage fragile Gaza truce
description: Rare US-Hamas talks come as the war on Iran strains the battered Gaza ceasefire and post-war plans.

title: Gavaskar links Sunrisers signing of Pakistan’s Abrar to Indian deaths
description: The signing of Pakistan bowler Abrar Ahmed by Hundred franchise Sunrisers bucked trend by Indian-owned teams.

title: What we know about deadly strike on Kabul medical centre
description: Afghan officials say a suspected Pakistani air strike hit a drug rehabilitation centre in Kabul, killing hundreds.

title: Macron prepares France for ‘an age of nuclear weapons’ as Iran war rages
description: The French president described his plans for expansion as forward deterrence. Whats behind his move?

title: The US-Israel war on Iran is shaped by religion as much as strategy
description: The conflict has mutated into a zero-sum collision of competing messianic frameworks.

title: Iran blames US, Israel for Hormuz tensions as crisis risks energy supplies
description: Irans Araghchi calls for global condemnation of ‘military aggression’ that disrupted transit through Strait of Hormuz.

title: UN warns of record hunger, 45 million more at risk, if Iran war continues
description: The Middle East conflict risks adding a staggering 45 million to acute hunger, warns the UNs World Food Programme.

title: Thousands of Christians are being evicted in Pakistan’s capital
description: Thousands of Christians are being evicted in Pakistan’s capital

title: Pakistan air strike kills at least 100 at Kabul drug rehab centre
description: Some of the bodies were injured beyond recognition, forensic laboratory sources told the BBC.

title: Europe Has Helped the U.S. Protect Shipping. The Strait of Hormuz Is Different.
description: European Union ministers and leaders pushed back on ideas to protect the strait, including expanding a maritime operation already in place in the Red Sea.

title: Joe Kent, a Top Counterterrorism Official for the Trump Administration, Resigns, Citing Iran War
description: Mr. Kent announced his resignation as director of the National Counterterrorism Center. He said that pressure from Israel had pushed President Trump into war against Iran.

title: At Least 23 Killed in Nigeria as Insurgent Attacks Go On Despite U.S. Help
description: A teaching hospital and two markets in the city of Maiduguri were hit in what a military spokesman said were suicide bombings by Boko Haram.

title: Sucked Into War, Gulf Countries Face the Limits of U.S. Security Guarantees
description: Barraged by Iranian attacks and questioning the value of security ties with the United States, nations in the Gulf have turned to Ukraine, Australia and Italy for help.
